author: lOrm
content: #577 send_message tool itself remains blocked on #507 coordinator subsystem. Per kickoff brief, verified DenialTracker is in tree at src/permissions.rs:208 (pub struct DenialTracker with consecutive/total/limits; record_denial / record_allowed / reset / escalation_state methods). 4 tests pin the contract. Closing as the addressable surface is in place; send_message itself is tracked under #507 as a transitive blocker.
